provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content: These regulations may be cited as the Education (Examinations in Schools) Regulations.

provisions.title: Conducting examinations
provisions.content: The Commissioner or any Board or body lawfully constituted for this purpose by the Minister may conduct or cause to be conducted an examination of the pupils, in schools for the purpose of completing primary education and for selecting pupils for admission in post-primary institutions.

provisions.title: Examination standards
provisions.content: The examination of the pupils in the prescribed standard, shall be in such form including oral and written work and shall cover such subjects as the Commissioner, the Board or body lawfully constituted in that behalf may deem appropriate.

provisions.title: Selection of pupils
provisions.content: Selection of pupils to government and grant aided community post-primary schools shall be done by a selection committee which shall function under the instruction of the Commissioner.

provisions.title: Examination period
provisions.content: The examination of pupils in post-primary schools shall be at such intervals, and in such form and shall cover such subjects as the Commissioner, Board or body lawfully constituted in that behalf may deem appropriate.

provisions.title: Revocation
provisions.content: [Revokes the Education (Examinations in Public Schools) Regulations 1 .] 1 G.N.
